behaviors.description: The generated reply references specific points from the incoming email rather than producing a generic response.
behaviors.justification:
Slot A: "references specific points from the incoming email rather than producing a generic response."
Slot B: Pass/fail depends on real model judgment about grounding to thread details.
Slot C: A stubbed model can always return a pre-grounded fixture and hide real generic-output failures.
Final label: Agentic, based on Slot B model-dependent grounding and Slot C mock-miss risk. Rejected Workflow because the behavior targets one model decision, not multiple agentic decisions in sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real drafting model on diverse real email threads and assert the reply contains thread-specific entities/actions (not only template language), with human/auditor rubric for groundedness.

behaviors.description: The factual consistency check flags claims in the draft that contradict entries in the knowledge base.
behaviors.justification:
Slot A: "flags claims in the draft that contradict entries in the knowledge base."
Slot B: Failure appears at checker↔KB module handoff (claim extraction/matching against stored facts).
Slot C: Unit tests of checker internals miss wiring issues like wrong KB query fields or mismatch normalization.
Final label: Integration, based on Slot B cross-module boundary and Slot C adjacent-lower miss-proof. Rejected System because behavior text does not require real OS/network/subprocess; rejected Agentic because this behavior text does not state model-quality dependence for contradiction detection.
behaviors.test_description: Wire draft parser, contradiction checker, and a local KB fixture together; feed drafts with known contradictory and non-contradictory claims and verify contradiction flags and references to conflicting KB entries.

behaviors.description: When the knowledge base has no relevant entries, the draft includes a disclaimer rather than fabricating facts.
behaviors.justification:
Slot A: "draft includes a disclaimer rather than fabricating facts."
Slot B: Correctness depends on real model behavior under missing-context conditions.
Slot C: Mocked outputs can always include a disclaimer and cannot reveal real hallucination/fabrication risk.
Final label: Agentic, based on Slot B LLM output dependence and Slot C mock-hide failure. Rejected Workflow because this behavior validates one LLM decision conditioned on empty retrieval, not a multi-agentic chain.
behaviors.test_description: Use real model calls with prompts where retrieval returns no KB hits; assert the draft includes explicit uncertainty/disclaimer language and does not assert unsupported factual claims.

behaviors.description: The approval workflow blocks sending until the user explicitly approves — no draft is sent automatically.
behaviors.justification:
Slot A: "blocks sending until the user explicitly approves — no draft is sent automatically."
Slot B: Failure is in state handoff between approval state machine and send service.
Slot C: Unit-testing only the state function can miss miswired event handlers that still trigger send.
Final label: Integration, based on Slot B module interaction and Slot C adjacent-lower miss-proof. Rejected System because real network/email provider behavior is not required to detect premature send attempts.
behaviors.test_description: Run approval controller + send gateway with an in-process sender spy; verify no send call before explicit approve event, and exactly one send after approval.

behaviors.description: The full sequence — read thread, generate draft, check facts, present for approval — works end-to-end for a real email thread.
behaviors.justification:
Slot A: "full sequence — read thread, generate draft, check facts, present for approval — works end-to-end for a real email thread."
Slot B: This is a full agent pipeline with sequential stage handoffs, including a real LLM drafting step.
Slot C: Lower-level isolated tests can pass while cross-stage context propagation/regression fails in the end-to-end path.
Final label: Workflow, based on Slot B full pipeline sequencing and Slot C integration-level blind spots. Rejected Agentic as minimum because the behavior explicitly requires the multi-stage sequence, not just single-step model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the real pipeline on a real thread fixture: ingest thread, call real drafting model, run factual check, and require approval gate before send eligibility; assert artifacts and transitions at each stage plus final gated outcome.
